name: BYOAO — General Article

properties.name: author
properties.value: {% if author %}{{author|wikilink}}{% elseif meta:property:article:author %}{{meta:property:article:author|wikilink}}{% else %}unknown{% endif %}

properties.name: tags
properties.value: [web-clip, {{"Based on this article, suggest 3 relevant topic tags as comma-separated values (no # prefix, lowercase, hyphenated). Output ONLY the tags, nothing else."|prompt}}]
